chapters.title: There will be evils to the wife of the
chapters.content_preview: 39. There will be evils to the wife of the native born in Maatanga Yoga.  Note: The first line of this sloka is not given in the original to give full concept. However from sloka 37, it can be understood that the native’s wile will die between 44-46 years of his age.

chapters.title: Immediately (after expiry of his first
chapters.content_preview: 40. Immediately (after expiry of his first wife) he will get (re)married. He will be abun- dantly happy in Saturn’s sub-period (of Moon Dasa). His Jupiter sub-period will give even results,  Notes: The sub-periods of Jupiter and

chapters.content_preview: 41. Koorma Yoga: In his Sth Dasa, there will be a marriage in his family, and also financial gains. Due to Koorma Yoga there will occur hap- piness. chapters.title: For one born in Maathanga Nadiamsa, a
chapters.content_preview: 53. For one born in Maathanga Nadiamsa, a malefic in the twelfth house will cause a bad end. He will have children in his old age and his next birth will be in an outcaste family.  Lier | (aaqaise)

chapters.title: Coborns: Mars in ascendant (which is an
chapters.content_preview: 56. Coborns: Mars in ascendant (which is an immovable sign) while Jupiter is in the 5th house will deprive the native of after- borns. Even if there be such a birth, only death (of alter-born) will result.  Notes: Immovable signs are Taurus, Leo, Scorpio and Aquarius. For Taurus

chapters.title: The native of Abala Nadiamsa, first half
chapters.content_preview: 57. The native of Abala Nadiamsa, first half (independent of sloka 56) will have two sisters and one brother, will be passionate, and will not enjoy paternal happiness. So also maternal hap- piness will be absent.  TORY fagarqfarrys | gaat Sowa Sree beat 1 4c |

chapters.title: One born in the second half of Abala
chapters.content_preview: 58. One born in the second half of Abala Nadiamsa will have long- living parents while the native of former half of this Nadiamsa will have a long-living older brother.  Notes: The second half of Abala (or Prab- ha) Nadiamsa extends in an imniovable sign from 26 deg. 54’ to 27 de

chapters.title: The native right from his childhood will
chapters.content_preview: 78. The native right from his childhood will be rich and happy due to his paternal and mater- nal relatives. This will apply to birth in former half of Abala Nadiamsa. One born in the second half of this Nadiamsa will have two sisters who will have virtuous daughters.  Ter ca ae

chapters.title: In his 4th Dasa he will enjoy much hap
chapters.content_preview: 93. In his 4th Dasa he will enjoy much hap- piness. His 40th year will greatly endanger him.  Note: First line of $.93 is missing in the original.  Sees ble

chapters.title: Step-brother will have difficulties in
chapters.content_preview: 1. Step-brother will have difficulties in begetting progeny. He will initialy lose wealth on account of Sudras and then will lead a happy life.  2. When the native will be 8 or 10 years of age, financial losses to father will have to be feared. After sometime he will have good te

chapters.title: When the native will be 8 or 10 years of
chapters.content_preview: 2. When the native will be 8 or 10 years of age, financial losses to father will have to be feared. After sometime he will have good terms with children born to his other wife (than the native’s mother) and be happy.  Se TAN BS aPreETA | tc |

chapters.title: The native will become great (profes
chapters.content_preview: 1. The native will become great (profes- sionally, etc.) because of Jupiter being in Lagna while Venus, the 11th lord aspects the 10th, from his exaltation sign.  2, Childhood will be marked by difficulties as the 8th lord is in Lagna.

chapters.title: Royal kind of wealth and prosperity will
chapters.content_preview: 4. Royal kind of wealth and prosperity will occur to the native because of 2nd lord Saturn in Moolatrikona Rasi, conjunction of lords of Sth and 9th, Jupiter aspecting 5th and 9th, Rahu in the 10th aspected by an exalted planet, Sth lord Mars aspecting the Lagna-cum-4th lord Jupi
